title: Site Configuration
description: Per-site configuration for the SEO agent suite. One file per site you want the agent to operate on.

id.description: Stable identifier (kebab-case). Used as run dir name + dashboard agent id suffix.

mode.description: implement = data → analyze → write code → test → deploy → email (full agent loop). recommend = data → analyze → email recommendations only (no shipping). Use recommend for sites you don't own the codebase to.

site_url.description: GSC site identifier — sc-domain:example.com or https://example.com/

default_country_filter.description: ISO-3 country code for the US-segment derived files.

property_id.description: GA4 property numeric id, as a string.

db.description: Optional: production-DB stats. Set to null/omit for sites without a backend you can query.

container.description: For type=docker-exec: container name to docker exec into.

queries_file.description: Path (relative to config) to SQL or .js script that emits stats JSON to stdout.

revenue_kpis.description: Conversion events the agent should track + use for revenue-goal scoring. Empty array = pure rank/traffic focus.

label.description: Human label for emails (e.g., 'Instacart cart creates').

ga4_event.description: GA4 event name to track. Empty if DB-only.

db_table.description: DB table to count rows from. Optional.

implementer.description: Required if site.mode=implement. The implementer edits files in repo_path.

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the site's source repo on disk.

commit_message_template.description: Template, %s = run summary. Default: 'SEO agent run %s'.

deployer.description: Required if site.mode=implement. Pluggable: any sequence of test/build/push/deploy commands.

cmd.description: Test command. Hard gate: any non-zero exit aborts the run before deploy.
{tag} placeholder substituted with a date-time tag. {image} from deploy.vars.

agent_id.description: Agent id in the dashboard (one or more sites can roll up to one agent id, or each site can have its own).

auth.description: Where Google OAuth credentials live. The collector calls refresh-token.py against this.

runs_root.description: Where per-run output dirs are created. Each run writes to <runs_root>/<site.id>/<UTC-ts>/.
